java-app/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 21 to target the new JDK.
java-app/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the build will compile against Java 8, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing runtime incompatibilities if Java 21-specific APIs are used in the codebase.

java-app/pom.xml.general_idea: Add lombok-mapstruct-binding dependency to resolve compatibility issues between Lombok and MapStruct in newer Java versions.
java-app/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this binding, MapStruct may fail to compile or generate incorrect code when used with Lombok on Java 21 due to changes in how annotations are processed.

java-app/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Guava dependency from 26.0-jre to 29.0-jre to ensure compatibility with Java 21.
java-app/pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Guava may contain bugs or lack support for newer Java versions, potentially causing runtime errors or compilation issues on Java 21.

java-app/src/main/java/com/ninjacart/nfc.general_idea: Replace deprecated List.get(0) with List.getFirst() introduced in Java 21.
java-app/src/main/java/com/ninjacart/nfc.why_exists: List.get(int) is deprecated for removal in Java 21 when used with index 0 on non-empty lists, causing compile-time deprecation warnings or errors depending on compiler settings.
